hero.headline: Protecting Today, Shaping Tomorrow.
hero.tagline: Environmental, Social, Occupational Health & Safety Consulting
hero.sideTitle: Environmental, Social & Occupational Health & Safety Consulting
hero.sideBody: End-to-end advisory in environmental impact assessments, waste management, occupational health and safety, and sustainable social projects in Mozambique.
hero.cardBody: We support you throughout the entire project lifecycle, ensuring compliance, reduced impacts and long-term environmental value.

homeAbout.title: Who We Are
homeAbout.body1: BIOCLEAN ENVIRONMENT SU, LDA is a company providing environmental, social, and occupational health & safety consulting, headquartered in Nampula with a presence in Nampula and Maputo, Mozambique, founded in 2024. We work across different sectors, helping public and private organizations meet legal requirements, mitigate impacts and unlock sustainable development opportunities.
homeAbout.body2: With a multidisciplinary team and a results-oriented mindset, we combine technical rigor, local knowledge and innovative solutions to create environmental, social and economic value for our clients.

pillars.innovationBody: We apply modern methodologies and technology to deliver efficient environmental solutions tailored to the Mozambican context.
pillars.sustainabilityBody: We prioritize the balance between economic development, environmental conservation and community well-being.
pillars.complianceBody: We ensure alignment with Mozambican legislation and international environmental and social management standards.

homeServices.title: Our Services
homeServices.intro: A comprehensive portfolio of environmental, social and occupational health & safety services designed to support companies throughout the entire project lifecycle.

consultoria.title: Environmental Consulting
consultoria.description: Environmental Impact Studies (EIA), audits, management plans and environmental performance monitoring.

monitoramento.title: Environmental Monitoring
monitoramento.description: Periodic monitoring of physical, chemical and biological indicators to control impacts.

hst.title: Occupational Health & Safety
hst.description: Risk assessment, HIRA, safety plans and team training.

limpeza.title: General & Industrial Cleaning
limpeza.description: Professional cleaning for offices, industrial facilities and critical infrastructure.

residuos.title: Waste Management
residuos.description: Integrated solutions for municipal, industrial and hospital solid waste.

social.title: Social Implementation & Management
social.description: Social programs, resettlement, public consultation and community engagement.

items.teamBody: Engineers and specialists with hands-on experience across projects nationwide.
items.solutionsBody: Approaches tailored to the size, sector and maturity level of each client.
items.ecoBody: We prioritize materials and processes with a lower environmental footprint whenever possible.

homeCeo.title: CEO & Founder
homeCeo.name: Manuel Jivane Andrade
homeCeo.role: CEO | Community Development Engineer specializing in Water & Sanitation (WASH) | Environmental & Social Safeguards and HSE Analyst (OSHAcademy USA). Graduated from Universidade Eduardo Mondlane (2022).
homeCeo.bio: With experience in water, sanitation, waste management and environmental consulting projects, he leads BIOCLEAN ENVIRONMENT with a strong focus on technical rigor, ethics and positive community impact.

teamSection.title: Our Team
teamSection.intro: Multidisciplinary professionals combining technical expertise, compliance and innovation for our clients.

members.name: Manuel de Andrade
members.bio: A Rural Engineer and specialist in Water, Sanitation and Environmental Management, Manuel leads Bioclean Environment with a focus on growth, innovation and sustainability. With solid experience in HSE, environmental audits and project management, he ensures safe and efficient solutions for clients, promoting responsible health, safety and environmental practices.

members.name: Gere António da Paz
members.bio: HSSE (Health, Safety, Security and Environment) professional with over 10 years of experience in industrial projects, civil construction, maritime works and the energy sector. A specialist in safety management, legal compliance and risk prevention, Gere leads Bioclean’s HSE operations, promoting operational excellence, workplace safety and sustainability across all company projects.

members.name: Mauro Zibane
members.bio: Responsible for managing and evolving Bioclean’s technology infrastructure, including development and maintenance of the website, systems and digital solutions. He implements technologies that improve operational efficiency and strengthen the company’s digital presence.

members.name: Milton Guambe
members.bio: Responsible for human resources and financial processes, including credit control, administration and decision support. Known for organisation, accountability and the ability to perform under pressure, contributing to Bioclean’s smooth internal operations.

members.name: Isidro Simão
members.bio: Environmental Engineer with experience in environmental management, social safeguards and HSE on large-scale projects. He works on environmental impact assessment, licensing and management plans, ensuring compliance with national and international standards and promoting project sustainability.

items.name: Environmental Audit — Mining Company, Nampula
items.description: Comprehensive assessment of environmental compliance and process optimization to reduce impacts.

items.name: Occupational Safety Plan — Construction Company, Pemba
items.description: Development of a safety plan and OHS training for construction teams.

items.name: Industrial Cleaning — Logistics Warehouse, Nacala
items.description: Specialized deep-cleaning and maintenance service for logistics warehouses.

items.name: EIA — Agro-Industrial Project, Zambézia
items.description: Environmental impact assessment for a new agro-industrial venture focused on sustainable resource use.

items.name: Waste Management — Provincial Hospital, Nampula
items.description: Implementation of an integrated management plan for hospital waste.

items.name: Community Resettlement — Infrastructure Project
items.description: Technical support for resettlement processes and community engagement.

homeCta.title: Ready to Make Your Business More Sustainable?
homeCta.subtitle: Talk to us and we will design a solution tailored to your project needs.

items.q1: How long does it take to respond to my request?
items.a1: We typically respond within 1 business day, depending on project complexity.
items.q2: Do you only serve companies in Nampula?
items.a2: No. We are headquartered in Nampula with a presence in Nampula and Maputo, and we work across Mozambique according to client needs.
items.a3: The initial request analysis and preparation of a base proposal have no associated costs.
items.q4: How can I request technical consulting?
items.a4: Get in touch via the form, email or phone. We will respond with a tailored proposal for your project.

homeContactMini.title: How Can We Help?
homeContactMini.description: Reach out by phone, email or through the dedicated form on the contact page.

footer.tagline: Environmental, social, and occupational health & safety consulting company in Mozambique.

footer.address: Muhala Expansão, Nampula · presence in Nampula and Maputo, Mozambique

sobre.title: Committed to Environmental Excellence in Mozambique
sobre.intro: BIOCLEAN ENVIRONMENT SU, LDA was founded in 2024, headquartered in Nampula with a presence in Nampula and Maputo, to support companies and public institutions in placing environmental and social sustainability at the heart of their decisions as an environmental, social, and occupational health & safety consulting firm.

values.innovationLine2: Partnerships and tools for stronger environmental performance.
values.impactLine1: Focus on real impact for people and the environment.
values.impactLine2: Contributing to more sustainable business in Mozambique.

history.body: Since 2024, BIOCLEAN ENVIRONMENT SU, LDA has supported companies and public institutions in Mozambique to integrate environmental and social sustainability into their decisions, as an environmental, social, and occupational health & safety consulting company.

timeline.step1Item1: We started in Nampula with a presence in Nampula and Maputo to support more responsible projects.
timeline.step1Item2: Alignment with environmental and social legislation.
timeline.step1Item3: Focus on creating value for companies and communities.
timeline.step2Item1: Engineering, environmental management, OHS and social management.
timeline.step2Item2: Technical knowledge aligned with the Mozambican context.
timeline.step2Item3: Ability to operate across different provinces.
timeline.step3Item1: Close support throughout all project phases.
timeline.step3Item2: Clear indicators of compliance and performance.
timeline.step3Item3: Positive impact on communities and the environment.

ceo.name: MANUEL JIVANE ANDRADE
ceo.roleShort: CEO of BIOCLEAN ENVIRONMENT · Community Development Engineer (WASH) · Environmental & Social Safeguards · HSE Analyst (OSHAcademy USA) · Graduated from Universidade Eduardo Mondlane (2022).
ceo.academicBody: Bachelor in Rural Engineering, with specialization in Water and Sanitation from Universidade Eduardo Mondlane (2022).
ceo.expCeo: CEO – BIOCLEAN ENVIRONMENT (2024 – Present): leads growth and innovation strategy, delivering environmental, health, safety and social wellbeing solutions.
ceo.expZhongmei: Safety Officer – Zhongmei Engineering Group (Pty) Ltd: OHS experience, risk assessment, toolbox talks and progress reports.
ceo.expNampula: Occupational Health & Safety Officer – Nampula–Ribaué Road Rehabilitation Project (R13, 131 km): support for C-ESMP preparation (including GBV and GRM action plans); borrow pit management; environmental assessments and compliance monitoring with mitigation of erosion and water pollution; staff training; waste management and reporting; community mediation to reduce social and environmental impacts.

servicos.title: Integrated Solutions in Environment, Safety and Social Impact
servicos.intro: From environmental impact assessments to social programs and occupational health & safety, we offer a full portfolio of services tailored to the Mozambican reality.

projectos.title: Project Gallery
projectos.intro: A selection of projects illustrating the range of sectors and environmental and social challenges we work with in Mozambique.

contacto.title: Get in Touch
contacto.intro: Share the environmental and social challenges of your organization and we will work with you to find the best solution.
